note: One group per seeded flaw in input/design.md (arch-heldout-suite-scope.md §2). Matched case-insensitively over NFKC+casefold-normalized finding text (pattern+target+evidence), per-finding, with the frozen anti-stuffing rule imported from idea_gates. Detection floor: an alternate must plausibly match a genuine catch, and no alternate may match goals.md or repo-manifest.json (a review that merely restates the inputs earns nothing) — enforced by tests/test_arch_verifier_integrity.py.

groups.note: seeded flaw 1 (PHANTOM): data-flow step 2 hands records to a ReconciliationService that exists in no container list, no manifest module, no goal

seeded flaw 2 (MISSING_SEAM): goals require affected volunteers told within an hour of a shift change; the design's NotificationService does a Monday digest and nothing routes shift changes to it. Alternates demand absence-language or the named missing edge, so goal-restating text cannot fire.
seeded flaw 3 (UNSTATED_ASSUMPTION): read replicas + PgBouncer sized for 100k concurrent sessions against a stated ~200-volunteer, few-dozen-peak reality
seeded flaw 4 (SCOPE_CREEP): GamificationEngine (badges, leaderboard) traceable to no goal; goals state there are no requirements beyond the six
